title: The Garden of Eden
writer: Hanns Kräly, Avery Hopwood, Rudolph Bernauer
actors: Corinne Griffith, Louise Dresser, Lowell Sherman
plot: Toni le Braun (Corinne Griffith) is a hopeful, talented opera singer who gets a letter from Budapest saying that she has acquired a singing job. Unfortunately, she soon learns that the local venue in which she is to sing is not an...
